title: Decommission go/no-go checklist
purpose: Formal sign-off checklist prior to disabling legacy Firebase paths.

dependencyEvidence.requirement: All production-used Firebase functions mapped to approved replacement owner and interface.
Storage/object parity checks complete, with unresolved manual checks explicitly accepted or remediated.
Incremental client cutover and rollback switches defined per surface.

goNoGoPolicy.rule: No-Go if any P0/P1 gate is unmet; Go requires all critical gates green and all exception approvals documented.
goNoGoPolicy.decisionWindow: Within approved maintenance window with active on-call coverage.

checklist.check: Every Firebase function/trigger in the replacement matrix is marked implemented or explicitly deferred with approval.
evidenceRequired: Updated function matrix with owner + status
Linked implementation PRs/issues for each non-deferred function

checklist.check: All client surfaces (web-admin, portal, android, ios) have validated cutover switches and rollback toggles.
evidenceRequired: Rollback drill log for each surface

checklist.check: Storage/object parity checks are complete and no unaccepted high-risk parity gaps remain.
evidenceRequired: Manual check signoff notes for previously manual-required checks

checklist.check: Dashboards and alerts cover API errors, latency, request failures, and notification delivery after cutover.
evidenceRequired: Alert policy definitions and test trigger outputs

checklist.check: Rollback procedure is tested end-to-end and target rollback time objective is met.
Legacy service-account keys/rules identified for retirement and post-cutover key rotation queued.
Maintenance window, stakeholder comms, and freeze policy are approved.
evidenceRequired: Stakeholder notification template and send log

checklist.check: Smoke tests for login/request/note/media/invoice workflows pass on migrated paths.
evidenceRequired: Test run report with pass/fail summary
Any residual defect list and mitigation owner

immediateActions: Keep all Firebase routes and toggles in current stable state.
Open incident/change record with blocking gate IDs.
reentryCriteria: All blocking gates remediated or exception-approved.
Updated checklist re-reviewed by all decision authorities.
